_comment: Add this 'hooks' section to settings.json on macOS. Add Parry hook only after installing parry.

hooks.prompt: Check the conversation: Were any protected settings modified? Verify in ~/.claude/settings.json that: (1) effortLevel is 'high', (2) env.CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL is 'high', (3) env.CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL is 'sonnet', (4) model is 'claude-opus-4-6'. If ANY of these changed, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Protected setting was modified: [which one]"}. If all are intact, respond with {"ok": true}.

Before context compression: Extract and list any critical information that should survive compaction: (1) Current task status and progress, (2) File paths that were modified, (3) Decisions made by the user, (4) Any pending actions. Format as a concise summary that can be injected after compaction.
